LANDING_TAGLINE: Party word game — mobile first, real-time fun.
GUIDE_INTRO: Contact is a team word-guessing game for 3 or more players. One player holds a secret word while everyone else gives clues and tries to discover it together.
GUIDE_ROLE_CLUE_GIVER: Clue Giver — knows the secret word and can block wrong guesses during a contact.
GUIDE_ROLE_GUESSER: Guessers — write clues and call Contact when they think they know what someone is hinting at.
GUIDE_FLOW_1: The Clue Giver secretly picks a word (4–12 letters). Only the first letter is shown to everyone else.
GUIDE_FLOW_2: Guessers take turns posting clues on the board.
GUIDE_FLOW_3: When you think you understand a clue, tap Contact on it. You and the clue's author both type the word you're thinking of.
GUIDE_FLOW_4: If you both type the same word, a new letter of the secret word is revealed.
GUIDE_FLOW_5: If you both type the full secret word, the round ends and the scoreboard is shown.
GUIDE_FLOW_6: The Clue Giver role rotates each round until everyone has had a turn.
GUIDE_CONTACT_1: You have a short countdown to submit your word.
GUIDE_CONTACT_2: The Clue Giver may try to block by guessing the word you agreed on.
GUIDE_CONTACT_3: Words that already matched this round (but were not the secret word) cannot be used again.
GUIDE_SCORE_PARTIAL: Partial match (same word, not the secret word): +15 pts for each player in the contact.
GUIDE_SCORE_WORD: Secret word guessed on a contact: +50 pts for the clue author, +25 pts for whoever called Contact.
GUIDE_SCORE_BLOCK: Successful block by the Clue Giver: +15 pts.
GUIDE_RULE_1: Minimum 3 players. The host approves who joins the room.
GUIDE_RULE_2: Secret words are 4–12 letters only (no spaces, numbers, or symbols).
GUIDE_RULE_3: You cannot call Contact on your own clue.
GUIDE_RULE_4: Words that already matched this round (but were not the secret word) cannot be used again.
GUIDE_RULE_5: The Clue Giver role rotates to the next player each round.
GUIDE_RULE_6: After each round, the host starts the next round from the scoreboard.
SHARE_TEXT: Join my Contact game! Room code: {{roomCode}}
INVITE_SUBTITLE: Share the link or send the room code
WAITING_APPROVAL: Waiting for the host to approve your join request…
JOIN_REJECTED_MSG: The host declined your request to join this room.
MID_GAME_JOIN_HINT: Approve to let them in — they'll play starting next round.
JOIN_NEXT_ROUND_HINT: Watch the game for now. You'll play when the next round starts.
SECRET_WORD_INVALID: Use {{min}}–{{max}} letters only (no spaces, numbers, or symbols)
WORD_ALREADY_USED: This word was already matched this round
USED_WORDS_HINT: These matched words cannot be used again this round
WAITING_NEXT_ROUND: Waiting for host to start next round…
RECONNECT_FAILED: Could not reconnect to the game. Go back and rejoin with your nickname.
